name: content-calendar
description: Weekly content plan draft via C13 analytics + /research (C16)
config_hints: requires social connector (C13) for post analytics

weekly cron: { "id": "content-calendar", "cron": "Mon 09:00", "text": "Content calendar: pull top posts from last week via /mcp social analytics; run /research trending topics in niche; draft weekly plan to workspace/content/calendar-YYYY-Www.md with slots Mon–Sun", "session_id": "webchat:local" }
